case_title: TINA M. YUN VS. RACHEL SADD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUN, TINA M. DOING BUSINESS AS ATOMY CONNECT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SADD, RACHEL $225.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $255.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
